Notice Of Motion And Moiton For Order Charging Member'S Interest
Off Calendar Dec-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ALISA KIM, ESQ., 415.826.9160, FOR PLAINTIFF CITY NATIONAL BANK, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CITY NATIONAL BANK, A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION'S MOTION For Order Charging Member'S Interest IS Granted in part. The Court continued this matter from November 26, 2013 so that defendant could file an opposition brief. No opposition was filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
